nasb.text: He set up priests of his own for the high places, for the satyrs and for the calves which he had made.

esv.text: and he appointed his own priests for the high places and for the goat idols and for the calves that he had made.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安為邱壇、公山羊神，以及他鑄造的牛犢，自己設立了祭司。

ccb.text: 耶罗波安却为丘坛、公山羊像和他造的牛犊像设立他自己的祭司。
